title: pyrethrum spilanthus
intro: Pyrethrum spilanthus, also known as fireweed or Maximilian's sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of pyrethrum spilanthus are said to provide relief from various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. Pyrethrum spilanthus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as applied topically in creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
